common.title: MCRE TOOLS
common.description: A collection of useful and fun tools.

index.termsOfUseDescription1: The tools and content on this site are provided for reference only. We cannot guarantee their accuracy or reliability, so please use them at your own discretion and risk.
index.termsOfUseDescription2: The site owner is not responsible for any damages that may arise from using this site. Content may change or be removed without prior notice.

group-roulette.title: Group Roulette
group-roulette.descriptionShort: Spin the same roulette wheel with a group.
group-roulette.description: Create a room, share the URL, and keep options, spins, and results synced across everyone’s screen.
group-roulette.privacyNotice: Option names, display names, and raw spin history are stored for administrator review for a limited period.

jukugo.title: Jukugo Puzzle
jukugo.description: This tool helps you solve a traditional Japanese puzzle, known as 'Wado Kaichin', where you guess the kanji in the center based on the surrounding four kanji.
jukugo.transitionNotice:
Welcome to the new 'Jukugo Puzzle' site.
If you came from the old site, please update your bookmark.
jukugo.arrowDescription: You can tap the arrows to reverse their direction.
